category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Zimbabwe EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入津巴布韦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入辛巴威：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Zimbabwe SAZ standards conformity, ZERA / ZETDC grid-connection coordination, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, OCPP interoperability, Zimbabwe 230/400 V 50 Hz grid conditions, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与津巴布韦SAZ标准符合性、ZERA / ZETDC并网协调、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、OCPP互操作、津巴布韦230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與辛巴威SAZ標準符合性、ZERA / ZETDC併網協調、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、OCPP互操作、辛巴威230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Zimbabwe, the practical gaps are IEC-based safety, EMC, and connector evidence through SAZ-aligned conformity expectations; hardware conversion from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC because GB/T connectors are physically incompatible; ZERA / ZETDC coordination for grid-connected sites; and confirmation that the charger can operate on Zimbabwe's 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply under local reliability constraints. Zimbabwe's EV charging market is still very nascent, and chronic load-shedding means many viable deployments will need solar-plus-battery or other backup-power design. A blanket Zimbabwe whole-unit mandatory EVSE certification rule could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current SAZ conformity route, HS code, charger type, ZERA requirements, and ZETDC connection path before shipment or installation.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入津巴布韦时，实务差距包括：按SAZ体系预期准备IEC安全、EMC和接口证据；由于GB/T接口在物理上不兼容，须将GB/T 20234硬件改为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；并网站点须与ZERA / ZETDC协调；并确认充电桩可在津巴布韦230/400 V、50 Hz供电及当地电力可靠性约束下运行。津巴布韦电动汽车充电市场仍处于非常早期，长期限电意味着许多可行部署需要太阳能加电池或其他备用电源设计。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认适用于所有EVSE整机的津巴布韦强制认证规则，出口商应在出货或安装前核实当前SAZ合格评定路径、HS编码、充电桩类型、ZERA要求和ZETDC接入路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入辛巴威時，實務差距包括：按SAZ體系預期準備IEC安全、EMC和接口證據；由於GB/T接口在物理上不兼容，須將GB/T 20234硬體改為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；併網站點須與ZERA / ZETDC協調；並確認充電樁可在辛巴威230/400 V、50 Hz供電及當地電力可靠性約束下運行。辛巴威電動汽車充電市場仍處於非常早期，長期限電意味著許多可行部署需要太陽能加電池或其他備用電源設計。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認適用於所有EVSE整機的辛巴威強制認證規則，出口商應在出貨或安裝前核實當前SAZ合格評定路徑、HS編碼、充電樁類型、ZERA要求和ZETDC接入路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SAZ scope determination, ZERA approval, ZETDC connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Zimbabwe conformity assessment rules, SAZ standard adoptions, ZERA requirements, ZETDC connection conditions, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SAZ适用范围裁定、ZERA批准、ZETDC接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行津巴布韦合格评定规则、SAZ标准采标情况、ZERA要求、ZETDC接入条件、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SAZ適用範圍裁定、ZERA批准、ZETDC接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行辛巴威合格評定規則、SAZ標準採標情況、ZERA要求、ZETDC接入條件、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
